english_script:
Hi guys, it's Ivy. Day 2 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a YouTube short about how to stay focused. The video shared a simple method. It talked about the "Pomodoro Technique". This method helps you work in short bursts. You work for 25 minutes. Then you take a 5-minute break. After four rounds, you take a longer break. The video explained why this works. It helps your brain stay fresh. You do not get tired easily. Another tip was to remove distractions. Put your phone away. Close extra tabs on your computer. The speaker also said to set a clear goal. Know what you want to finish in each 25-minute block. From this I learned that small breaks can make a big difference. I want to try this method tomorrow.

Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation:
嗨，大家好，我是Ivy。我每天练习英语的第二天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我看了一个关于如何保持专注的YouTube短视频。这个视频分享了一个简单的方法。它谈到了“番茄工作法”。这个方法帮助你在短时间内工作。你工作25分钟。然后休息5分钟。完成四个循环后，你休息更长的时间。视频解释了为什么这有效。它帮助你的大脑保持清醒。你不容易感到疲劳。另一个建议是排除干扰。把你的手机放一边。关闭电脑上多余的标签页。演讲者还说设定一个明确的目标。知道在每个25分钟的时间段里你想完成什么。从这我学到了小休息可以带来大不同。我想明天试试这个方法。

谢谢聆听，明天见。
